epg.title: 2 + 4 = 24 documentary
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

1 Rider. 1 Driver. 2 Races - each over 24 hours.

epg.title: Porsche Carrera Cup Middle East
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

Watch the 2023-2024 Porsche Carrera Cup Middle East round 3 first race at Dubai Autodrome.

epg.title: Chantilly Arts & Elegance Richard Mille 2024
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

While Chantilly Arts & Elegance Richard Mille's focus on elegance has remained unchanged, the Competition has undergone a complete overhaul, offering manufacturers of premium brands a new, private setting to welcome their guests over three days. The 2024 edition was an exceptional success, with record attendance and increased participation from the major car brands. The event won acclaim for both the quality of the cars on display and the exclusive experience offered to guests, consolidating its position as one of the must-attend events for elegance and prestige motoring.

epg.title: Fusion, Motorsport meets Sim Racing
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

BMW Motorsport merges reality and simulation. BMW Group Motorsport team collaborates with Fanatec to develop the new BMW M4 GT3 steering wheel.

epg.title: Castrol Toyota Formula Regional Oceania Championship
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

Watch the first race of the second round of the 2025 Castrol Toyota Formula Regional Championship season at Hampton Downs Motorsport Park, New Zealand.

epg.title: Gearing Up
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

In this episode, we kick things off in Greece, exploring a one-of-a-kind adventure that unfolded there! The 2024 Hellas 24 Hours Rally invited ambitious riders to embark on a once-in-a-lifetime adventure through Greece’s most rugged and breathtaking landscapes in a non-stop, high-octane off-road rally! With Loutraki as the point of reference, this rally was designed for both seasoned competitors and true off-road enthusiasts who crave the thrill of conquering unpredictable terrain. They should all be ready for 24 hours of extreme driving challenges, thrilling night stages, and a battle of endurance where every second counts.

epg.title: Rally Raid
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

Catch all the highlights from the third stage of Rallye du Maroc.

epg.title: Red Bull Romaniacs 2024 - Full Review
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

All of the highlights from the 2024 edition of Red Bull Romaniacs.

epg.title: Adventure Bike
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

The team get 3 of the big hitters, the BMW 1250 GSA, the KTM 1290 Adventure S and the Ducati Multistrada Enduro, and test them head to head. In part 4 of Tales from the Trails, Graham and Sam gang up of Tom and Graham Rides the roads in Scotland.

epg.title: Banned F1 Tech
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

Banned F1 Tech

epg.title: Porsche Carrera Cup Middle East
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

Watch the 2023-2024 Porsche Carrera Cup Middle East round 3 second race at Dubai Autodrome.

epg.title: Castrol Toyota Formula Regional Oceania Championship
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

Watch the second race of the second round of the 2025 Castrol Toyota Formula Regional Championship season at Hampton Downs Motorsport Park, New Zealand.

epg.title: TCR South America - El Pinar: Race 1
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

Watch the action from Race 1 of the fifth round of the 2024 TCR South America championship.

epg.title: SUPER GT
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

The SARD Toyota team ended a four-year winless streak in the sixth round of the SUPER GT season at Autopolis on Sunday, with Yuhi Sekiguchi and Yuichi Nakayama securing their first victory together in the No. 39 Toyota GR Supra.

epg.title: The 5 worst title defences in F1 history
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

While managing to successfully defend a Formula 1 world title is an incredibly difficult task, there have been several occasions in F1’s history where a failed title defence has been surprisingly poor. Autosport’s Technical Editor Jake Boxall-Legge has five such examples of drivers who not only failed to hit the heights of the championship year, but plummeted down the pecking order.

epg.title: Adventure Bike
epg.description:
| +TP | Deportes |

Final Episode of Season 7. The presenters are given free rain to pick their favourite Adventure Bike, and they make a mess of it as usual! The last Tales from the Trails, finishing up at Pendine, after some fun in a jet plane and part 2 of Louisa Swaden's land speed record adventure.
